rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified that the cluster was running in TLS/secure mode (not insecure), located the certs at /cockroach/cockroach-certs/, and used --certs-dir to connect. It successfully set kv.snapshot_rebalance.max_rate to 416 MiB (confirmed by SHOW CLUSTER SETTING returning '416 MiB'), then deleted crdb-cluster-0, waited for it to become Ready, and verified the setting persisted post-restart (again '416 MiB'). The oracle verdict at the time of stage execution was 'pass'. The regression sweep failure for stage_04 (showing 208 MiB) is attributable to a later stage in the workflow resetting the value — stage_05's oracle itself shows '208MiB verified' as passing, confirming a subsequent stage changed the setting, which is outside this agent's scope.
